rpfmDialog.title: RPFM-CLI not found
rpfmDialog.content:
The Workshop scan needs RPFM-CLI to read mod pack files, but it could not be found at the configured path.

Open Settings → Folders → RPFM to update the path or download a fresh copy.

labels.upgradingLegacy: Upgrading legacy validation records to the new format.
labels.closingWillPause: Closing the app will pause the update; it will resume on next launch.

plan.resumeBody: A previous update was interrupted. $already of $totalAll units already processed. Remaining: $remaining units • Estimated: ~$estimated.
plan.freshBody:
This release uses a new, richer format for translation validation diagnostics. All existing translations need to be rescanned once to benefit from it.

$total units to rescan • Estimated: ~$estimated

This will only run once. Do not close the app until it completes — if interrupted, the update will resume on next launch.
